zh.lifeSummary: 當William Crispe於1475年出生在英國素福爾可拉可費爾德時，他的父親Robert Crispe15歲，母親Clemens Crispe5歲。他於1515年與Anne Godbold在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。他去世於1552年1月19日在他的家鄉享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: Crispe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Crisp
meanings: English: nickname for a man with curly hair, from Middle English crisp, crips, scrip, Old English crisp, cryps (from Latin crispus), reinforced in Middle English by an Old French word also from Latin crispus. In some cases this is possibly a nickname from the personal name Crispin .
Americanized form of German Krisp: nickname from Middle High German krisp, krispel ‘curly-haired man’.
Americanized form of German Krisp: from a short form of the medieval personal name Krispin (see Crispin ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When William Crispe was born in 1475, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, his father, Robert Crispe, was 15 and his mother, Clemens Crispe, was 5. He married Anne Godbold in 1515, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. He died on 19 January 1552, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Crispe est né en 1475, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Crispe, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Clemens Crispe, avait 5 ans. Il a épousé Anne Godbold en 1515, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Il est décédé le 19 janvier 1552, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Crispe 1475 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Crispe 15 und seine Mutter Clemens Crispe 5. Er hat 1515 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Anne Godbold geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Januar 1552 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Crispe è nato il nel 1475 nel Laxfield, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Robert Crispe, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Clemens Crispe, aveva 5 anni. Lui sposato Anne Godbold nel 1515, nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì il 19 gennaio 1552, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Crispe(이)가 1475년 영국 수폴크 라스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Crispe(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Clemens Crispe(은)는 5세였다. 그는 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 Anne Godbold(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1552년 1월 19일 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Crispe nasceu em 1475, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Crispe, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Clemens Crispe, tinha 5 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Godbold em 1515, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de janeiro de 1552, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Crispe родился в 1475 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Crispe было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Clemens Crispe, 5. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Godbold в 1515 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Он умер 19 января 1552 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Crispe nació en 1475, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Crispe, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Clemens Crispe, tenía 5 años. Se casó con Anne Godbold en 1515, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Murió el 19 de enero de 1552, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
